text:
By the way, I've had a kind offer from Glen Barber of tarball hosting,
so I've attached a patch for the Makefile.

If it's easier, the address for the second master site is
http://freebsd.dev-random.com/opentracker/

Chris

A: Because it messes up the order in which people normally read text.
